title: UCSL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 14 Commissioning Engineer & Assistant Posts
description: The Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 14 Commissioning Engineer & Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Electrical, Mechanical Engineering, and 10th can apply for the UCSL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
